HomePage.description: Discover, rate, and discuss the public perception of your favorite (and not-so-favorite) famous figures. Share your opinion and see what the world thinks!
HomePage.searchPlaceholder: Type a name and press enter or click search.
HomePage.discoverFiguresDesc: Search or browse through profiles of public figures from various fields.
HomePage.expressPerceptionDesc: Vote for the emotion a figure evokes in you and see global results.
HomePage.joinDiscussionsDesc: Share your opinions in comment sections and react to others.
HomePage.shareProfilesDesc: Easily share profiles with your friends on social media.

LoginForm.title: Welcome Back!
LoginForm.description: Log in to your StarSage account to continue.

SignupForm.title: Create an Account
SignupForm.description: Join StarSage to rate, discuss, and customize your profile.
